caption: A man with glasses wearing a black button-down shirt sits at a desk in a high-tech studio. He is positioned in front of several large digital monitors displaying columns of data, technical readouts, and the "Tiger-TV" logo in the upper right corners. A blue and white banner across the bottom of the screen reads "TOM O'BRIEN IS HERE TO HELP". As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a steady gaze toward the camera while slightly shifting his facial expression and posture. His hands rest on the desk surface. While the background data screens remain largely static, the man's subtle movements and blinking indicate he is speaking or reacting. The lighting is dim, emphasizing the glow from the screens and the brightly lit banner at the bottom of the frame.
